title: hieracium atratum subsp. pereffusum
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. pereffusum, also known as the Common Hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium atratum subsp. pereffusum include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory, making it useful for treating urinary issues and reducing swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies. Hieracium atratum subsp. pereffusum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
